_readme: Official WotC / Magic: The Gathering YouTube announce trailers.
Curated only — never invent a video ID. Prefer the official MTG channel.
Match by Scryfall set code (byCode) and/or exact set name (byName, case-insensitive).
Future Standard sets usually only have a byName entry until Scryfall catalogs them.
youtubeId is the 11-char watch?v= value (e.g. jPaHUxive30).
